title: Extra Tough Wood Varnish - 250ml - Fast Drying, Clear Varnish for Wood - Low Odour, Water-Based Varnish - Protects Interior Wood from Scratches and Stains- Satin
features: ENHANCED FINISH: Our clear wood varnish is available in three sheens: matt, satin, and gloss. The varnish enhances all wooden surfaces bringing out the natural beauty of the wood and enhancing the depth of colour, whilst also adding superior protection against knocks, stains, and spills.
QUICK DRYING: A quick-to-dry polyurethane varnish that gives a smooth finish to doors, skirting boards, furniture and other joinery. Touch dry in 30 minutes.

DURABLE FINISH: This varnish for wood dries to give a clear, tough, non-yellowing coating which protects against knocks and scratches. The varnish also acts as a waterproof sealant, preventing water and liquid stains from soaking in.
WATER-BASED FORMULA: As it is water-based, this clear varnish for wood is safe to use and easy to clean up. It also has a low VOC content and is virtually odour free.

MULTIPLE USES: Suitable for new and previously stained interior wood, our extra tough varnish enriches the natural colour and grain of all soft and hard woods. Use after applying our Wood Stain and then maintain varnished wooden surfaces using our Wood Cleaner.
description: Product Description Extra Tough Interior Varnish Our Interior Varnish is formulated for use on all indoor wooden surfaces such as furniture, skirting boards, doors and joinery. It’s water-based which makes it easy and safe to use with minimal clean up – just wash your brush or roller under the tap! When applied to any wooden surface it will enrich the natural colour and grain of the wood helping to create a lovely smooth finish in either matt, satin or gloss. The finish dries quickly to form a very tough and durable coating to protect against knocks, scratches and stains. The Varnish is great when applied to either newly or previously stained surfaces as it brings out the depth of colour in the stain finishing any project off nicely. The Benefits Creates a clear, durable, non-yellowing finish Great for doors, skirting, furniture and all interior woods Enriches the natural colour and grain of wood Suitable for new and previously stained wood Low V.O.C content and virtually odour free Wood Cleaner Wood Stain Set of 4 Foam Brushes Lint Free Cloths Pre-Stain Wood Conditioner Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,066 4.3 out of 5 stars 11,564 4.0 out of 5 stars 954 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,394 4.3 out of 5 stars 158 Price £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.50 £ 4 . 50 £8.96 £ 8 . 96 Alternative Products The ultimate cleaner for all wooden surfaces. A highly concentrated stain that colours wood in one application. Ideal for applying paints, dyes, stains, oils, and varnishes on wood, leather, and other surfaces. Perfect for arts and crafts, DIY projects, and cleaning hard-to-reach areas. A great value 3-pack of high quality lint free cloths, perfect for applying creams, oils and waxes. Prepares wood prior to staining for a more even colour.
